productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Easytone Inspire White Shoe
description: SANDY WALK FOR SHAPELY LEGSEmulate the feel of walking on sand and shape up your legs and butt with reebok EasyTone Inspire shoes. An absolute hit with those who love that to-die-for body, the reebok EasyTone Inspire sneakers are fitted with balance pods in the outsole that create that mild instability to help you strengthen key muscles of your shins, glutes and feet, and burn those extra calories in style.Moving air that burns caloriesOptimized with Moving Air technology, this shoe activates key muscles in the calves and quads, reducing overall body stress. This innovative fitness shoe is engineered with built-in balance pods in certain points that transfer air in response to your stride. Such air movement creates micro instability with every step you take, forcing the leg muscles to work harder, increasing strength and endurance similar to what happens when walking on sand. Added to this is the DMX Shear cushioning in the Reebok EasyTone Inspire that absorbs shock on impact, enhancing comfort for the feet even during long runs.Added to the DMX Shear technology is the traditional foam base that makes the sneaker three times softer and helps you burn more calories. Even better is its SmoothFit leather and mesh upper that is practically devoid of seams, allowing your feet an abrasion-free ride. The Reebok EasyTone Inspire is also fitted with a removable polyurethane foam insole that absorbs shock and provides ample support to reduce foot fatigue. This also allows you to replace it with an orthotic for desired comfort.With anti-microbial linings covering the insole, you can be rest assured that while you're toning up your legs and butt, your feet are kept dry and fresh, safe from odour and moisture build-up, making it an absolute comfort to walk in.Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight breath ability Padded collar and tongue for superior Fit and comfort SmoothFit seamless design ensures minimal rub and decreases irritation Removable, antibacterial sockliner easily accommodates orthotics Lace-ups for a snug fit Midsole EVA midsole for cushioning and better shock absorption Outsole EasyTone's pockets of moving air technology promote micro-instability thereby helping to improve muscle tone in the glutes, calves and hamstrings Non-marking rubber outsole Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
